goal: Complete T0501-T0507 with remote ciphertext and plaintext recovery proof, exact source-message Trash control, deterministic Timeline Event and PNG construction, serial one-asset live replacement and an Australia/Sydney 04:30 schedule definition without exercising protected production authority.
scope: remote refetch, ciphertext digest and official-age plaintext recovery proof for Raw and Processed objects
explicit COMPLETE, WAITING, UNSUPPORTED, RAW_ONLY and QUARANTINED recovery decisions
exact users.messages.trash with second verification, mutation budget, label confirmation and Trash idempotency
Timeline Event UTC truth, Australia/Sydney display, business label date, lifecycle and M3 state
XNYS session lag and evidence-gated expectation states without false MISSING
deterministic fixed-size PNG rendering entirely in memory
fixed moomooau-live and timeline-latest.png.age serial replacement with encrypted repair state
04:30 Australia/Sydney daily schedule, Sunday full reconcile and workflow_dispatch planning
local synthetic Stage 5 evidence and no-Secret CI definitions
non_goals: real Gmail authorization, message access or mutation
real private repository lookup, write, release mutation, decrypt or recovery
reading or delivering production age identities, GitHub credentials, Gmail credentials or PDF passwords
enabling or deploying the protected production workflow
claiming schedule timeliness, successful remote execution or SLA
Moomoo Portal access, download, scraping or automation
thread-level Trash, permanent Gmail deletion or any non-source mutation
protected_oracles: real Gmail second verification, exact source-message Trash and Trash-label confirmation
real private repository Raw and Processed refetch, age decrypt and SHA recovery
real live Release asset replacement and repair after remote failure
real 04:30 Australia/Sydney scheduled execution including DST transition and delayed-run observation
real Sunday full reconcile and workflow_dispatch execution
production Secrets, environment approval and feature enablement
AC-002, AC-006, AC-007, AC-011, AC-017, AC-022, AC-023, AC-025 through AC-030 final oracles
remote Stage 5 CI and protected production workflow execution
rollback: Revert the single local Stage 5 commit; Stage 4 remains at its pinned verified commit and no remote state has changed.
stop_conditions: frozen Stage 0 manifest or cumulative Stage 4 gate drifts
real or sensitive sender, message, account, amount, credential, key or repository data enters the publishable tree
any mutation can occur without deterministic second verification and complete remote recovery proof
a thread, permanent-delete or non-source Gmail endpoint becomes reachable
plaintext can reach a private repository or Release persistence adapter
the live Release protocol can intentionally retain more than one target asset
a protected oracle would require mailbox, private-repository, credential, environment or remote-write authority
Stage 6 behavior is required to make a Stage 5 local gate pass
